title: halfInventory
description: Tired of Loosing all your items? Dont want to cheat using keep inventory? Keep 50% of your items and your tools
body:
halfInventory is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that offers a fair middle ground between losing everything on death and enabling full _keepInventory_.

When a player dies, 50% of their inventory is kept, while the rest is dropped normally. This keeps death meaningful without being overly punishing, making it ideal for vanilla+ survival servers.

Features:
- Keeps 50% of a player’s inventory on death
- Tools and items are selected automatically (no player interaction needed)
- Designed for survival and adventure gameplay
- Configurable Values

Why use halfInventory?

- Prevents total item loss without removing risk
- Discourages abusing keepInventory
- Great for SMPs, casual servers, or younger players
- Keeps gameplay balanced and rewarding

Compatibility

Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.x
Works on Paper, Spigot, Bukkit, and Folia
This plugin is written in Java and kept intentionally simple.

For questions, suggestions, or bug reports, feel free to reach out via Modrinth or email:
jan.koch@hexagonical.ch
